title: TC26 Structure (Working Group 2.5 Post-Quantum Cryptographic Mechanisms)
description: Structure page of TC26 (Technical Committee for Standardization 'Cryptographic Information Protection', a committee of Rosstandart). Lists Working Group 2.5 'Постквантовые криптографические механизмы' (Post-Quantum Cryptographic Mechanisms) under Subcommittee No. 2.

title: About TC26
description: About page of the Technical Committee for Standardization 'Cryptographic Information Protection' (TC26), Rosstandart's committee responsible for cryptographic standards including post-quantum work.

title: Standardization documents developed with participation of TC26 members and experts
description: Index of standardization documents (national standards, recommendations, technical specifications) developed within TC26, including the GOST R 34 cryptographic series that post-quantum mechanisms are intended to complement.

title: Draft documents (Проекты документов)
description: TC26 page hosting draft standardization documents under discussion. Reviewed: no post-quantum-specific draft currently published here as of June 2026.

title: Recommendations for standardization (Рекомендации по стандартизации)
description: TC26 listing of standardization recommendations. No explicitly post-quantum recommendation visible in search results.

title: Quantum cryptography: today or only tomorrow?
description: TC26 publication/event page on quantum cryptography. Concerns quantum key distribution rather than post-quantum (algorithmic) cryptography.

title: Information Security Library / financial sector cybersecurity (Bank of Russia)
description: Bank of Russia information-security legal acts page. No post-quantum-cryptography-specific document identified in search.

title: Main Directions for the Development of Information Security in the Credit and Financial Sphere
description: Bank of Russia strategic document on information-security development in the financial sector (2021). No explicit post-quantum cryptography reference confirmed.

title: National Technology Center for Digital Cryptography (НТЦ ЦК)
description: Official site of the ANO National Technology Center for Digital Cryptography, established under the Ministry of Digital Development (Mintsifry). Reported to include a quantum and post-quantum cryptography laboratory, but no explicit PQC document found on the front page.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography (TAdviser article)
description: TAdviser news/encyclopedia article aggregating Russian post-quantum cryptography developments (TC26, financial-sector pilots, Shipovnik). Non-institutional (industry news aggregator).

title: Gazprombank, Moscow Exchange and NSPK tested post-quantum cryptography
description: TAdviser report on Russian financial-sector post-quantum pilots presented to the Bank of Russia. Non-institutional news aggregator.

title: Shipovnik post-quantum signature open implementation (Kryptonite)
description: Vendor (Kryptonite/NPK Kriptonit) announcement of the 'Shipovnik' code-based post-quantum signature, submitted to TC26 working group. Non-institutional issuer (vendor).

title: Post-quantum cryptography as a new standard (Habr / Kryptonite)
description: Vendor blog post (Kryptonite on Habr) on Russian post-quantum standardization. Non-institutional.

title: Russian post-quantum cryptography and ... (RusCrypto conference paper)
description: RusCrypto 2022 conference presentation on Russian post-quantum cryptography. Academic/conference, non-institutional issuer.

title: Quantum MEPhI: post-quantum cryptography a breakthrough of the year (NRNU MEPhI)
description: University (MEPhI) press release on post-quantum cryptography work. University source - excluded by inclusion rules.
